creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text: Closing this, because I think it was user error.  After trying to manually update the bootcode, I discovered that I somehow didn't have the FreeBSD-loader package installed.  Force installing all of the FreeBSD-* packages and then installing the bootcode manually worked.  I don't know if I actually needed to manually update the bootcode: I forgot to try rebooting without doing that until after it was too late.
